results.alt: Artitect Machinery was founded with a single mission: to build the world's most precise and reliable sheet metal folding machines. From our roots in Detroit's manufacturing heartland, we've grown into a global leader trusted by fabricators, OEMs, and industrial manufacturers across six continents. 25 Years of Folding Perfection
